title: Reward or Punish? Understanding Preferences toward Economic or Regulatory Instruments in a Cross-National Perspective

excluded_policy_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: Use the tax system to reward people who protect the environment
excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Generic environmental tax/reward is not specified as a carbon, CO2, fossil-fuel, gasoline, diesel, or fuel excise tax.

inclusion_reason: The paper analyzes environmental policy instrument preferences, but the tax item is generic and not identifiable as a carbon or fuel tax.
exclusion_reason: It studies generic environmental tax rewards versus fines/information, without any explicit carbon, CO2, fossil-fuel, gasoline, diesel, or transport fuel tax.
